## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Diligent and GrowthX to discuss Q3 learnings, Q4 planning, and analytics reporting improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team clarified roles: Megan (Director) and Jo (Managing Editor) are primary points of contact for Diligent](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Diligent seeks improved regional/segmented organic search reporting capabilities; GrowthX to explore options with other clients](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [New conversion event reporting in Looker shows landing page contributions to lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [Diligent wants to better demonstrate incremental value of GrowthX's content efforts on traffic and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)

## Topics

### Team Structure and Communication

  - [Megan and Jo introduced as new GrowthX points of contact for Diligent, replacing Ada post-strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Tyler (Diligent) expressed need for clearer, more frequent reporting on GrowthX's impact to leadership](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)

### Regional Analytics Reporting

  - [Diligent seeks granular regional (APAC, EMEA) and sub-regional organic search reporting](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Current GrowthX analytics setup lacks regional visibility](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [Tyler open to creative solutions (e.g., using representative countries) to show regional trends](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Jo mentioned Kezia may explore other vendors for regional analytics needs](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)

### Conversion Tracking and Reporting

  - [New Looker report shows landing page contributions to lead form submissions](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [Discussion on improving attribution of GrowthX-refreshed content to conversions](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Tyler wants to demonstrate incremental lift from GrowthX efforts on traffic quality and conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)

### Content Performance Measurement

  - [Reviewed Looker dashboard filtering for GrowthX-touched URLs](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [Discussed challenges in isolating incremental impact of individual page refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Jo mentioned possibility of using specialized tools for statistically significant before/after comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)

### Q3 Performance and Q4 Planning

  - [Jo to provide detailed Q3 report for review](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)
  - [Focus on demonstrating value of attention and nurturing, even without immediate conversions](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1317.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to check with other teams about regional reporting workarounds](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Jo to add session data to the conversion event report in Looker](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Clarify distinctions between different lead form event types in Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Tyler to review Q3 report from Jo and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)
  - [Explore options for demonstrating incremental lift from GrowthX-refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Continue refining analytics reporting to better showcase GrowthX's impact on traffic and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/UEwcB9b1EqnMHpLa4_TsE858UfHzDUcs?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
